posts.content: Hey everyone, I'm a biology student,  and I love open talks. Ask me anything about life, love, studies or whatever is in your heart. No filters today! Let's chat honestly

replies.text: Sister why do beautiful muslim girls get easily grabbed by hindu men? They just smile and go with them. Is it because hindu men have bigger dick or something? Tell truth pls im dying here

Hahaha Riaz bhai you are crying like a little baby whose toy got stolen  First of all stop watching those videos at night. Hindu men don't have magic stick. Girls just like confidence and someone who doesn't message 'assalamualaikum behen ji' at 2am while hiding from mom. Biology fact: size doesn't matter if the man is shaking like leaf in wind.

Riaz you sound like those insecure muslim boys who measure everything in inches. My friend dated a hindu guy because he actually listens when she talks about her exams instead of asking 'beta namaz padhi?' every five minutes. Stop being cuck and work on yourself bro. We girls can smell insecurity from 10 km away

Lmao Riaz is typing with tears in eyes. 'Why they grab our beautiful ladies' – because our beautiful ladies are tired of boys who send good morning islamic quotes but can't even pay for coffee. Hindu guy took her to cafe, muslim guy took her to guilt trip about hellfire. Simple biology: attraction > insecurity. Go lift weights instead of crying in comments

Riaz bhai you made me laugh so hard my hijab almost fell. As biology student let me explain in simple words: It's not about dick size, it's about dick attitude. Hindu men act like men. Muslim boys act like they are already defeated and asking 'please don't leave me for rahul'. We girls want partner not another crying brother. Expose time: half of these insecure boys watch interfaith porn and then come here to cry. Fix your personality first
But sisters please tell truth... many muslim boys feel pain when they see pretty muslim girls with hindu guys. Is it really just confidence or something physical? Im asking for all brothers

Okay last biology lesson for today Riaz. In female brain, confidence lights up reward centers more than anything. If you keep asking 'do they have bigger one?' you already lost the game. My lab partner (hindu) helps me with practicals without making me feel guilty for studying late. You boys make us feel guilty for breathing. That's why we laugh and go. Now stop being professional cuck and become a man. Class dismissed

Riaz and all his crying gang – we muslim girls are not property to 'grab'. We choose who makes us happy. If hindu guy makes her laugh more than your sad islamic reels, what can we do? Stop feeling insecure and start fixing. Or keep crying, it's free entertainment for us
